title: Build SpecBridge Unique IA as a provider-neutral single-agent repository
goal: Create a clean local sibling copy of SpecBridge that runs the governed development lifecycle through one configured AI provider without depending on a second AI product.
product_principles: one configured provider identity for every lifecycle phase
fresh invocation boundaries between plan implementation review and closure
deterministic tests policy and repository evidence remain authoritative
fail closed on scope policy validation or provider failure
no secrets production deployment billing auth database or CI security changes
required_mvp_surfaces: plan implement validate review close lifecycle
dry-run default and explicit apply gate
structured run evidence and resumable state
